cases.prompt: PortOne으로 카드 결제랑 카카오페이 간편결제 붙여줘. 구독도 가능하게.

assertions.text: Produces payment integration code (PortOne) including 간편결제.
Adds webhook handlers and receipt verification.

cases.prompt: Implement Stripe subscription with webhook handlers and receipt verification.

assertions.text: Includes webhooks/receipt verification and a sandbox test suite.
